zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Crispe於1527年出生在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德時，她的父親William Crispe52歲，母親Anne Godbold35歲。她於大約1542年與Nicholas Fiske在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Crispe于1527年出生在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德时，她的父亲William Crispe52岁，母亲Anne Godbold35岁。她于大约1542年与Nicholas Fiske在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Crispe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Crisp
meanings: English: nickname for a man with curly hair, from Middle English crisp, crips, scrip, Old English crisp, cryps (from Latin crispus), reinforced in Middle English by an Old French word also from Latin crispus. In some cases this is possibly a nickname from the personal name Crispin .
Americanized form of German Krisp: nickname from Middle High German krisp, krispel ‘curly-haired man’.
Americanized form of German Krisp: from a short form of the medieval personal name Krispin (see Crispin ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Crispe was born in 1527, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, her father, William Crispe, was 52 and her mother, Anne Godbold, was 35. She married Nicholas Fiske about 1542, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1569, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Crispe est née en 1527, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Crispe, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Anne Godbold, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Fiske environ 1542, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1569, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Crispe 1527 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Crispe 52 und ihre Mutter Anne Godbold 35. Sie hat um 1542 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England Nicholas Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1569 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Crispe è nata il nel 1527 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Crispe, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Anne Godbold, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Fiske circa 1542, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1569, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Crispeが1527年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父William Crispeは52歳，母Anne Godboldは35歳であった。約1542年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでNicholas Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1569年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Crispe(이)가 1527년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Crispe(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Godbold(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1542년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 Nicholas Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Crispe nasceu em 1527, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Crispe, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Anne Godbold, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Fiske aproximadamente 1542, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1569, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Crispe родилась в 1527 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Crispe было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Godbold, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Fiske около 1542 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1569 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Crispe nació en 1527, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Crispe, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Anne Godbold, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Nicholas Fiske aproximadamente 1542, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1569, en su pueblo.
